summary: Comprehensive unit tests for dashboardModel covering rendering, date navigation, cursor/scroll behavior, filter cycling, expand/collapse, and ANSI-aware text wrapping

observations.text: TextWrapping tests use lipgloss.Width() for ANSI-aware line width measurement — correctly accounts for escape sequences in rendered output rather than naive len().

TestDashboard_ScrollFollowsCursor exercises cursor-driven auto-scroll by moving cursor 10 positions down in a 5-line viewport and verifying @chan11 is visible — validates the cardStartLines-based scroll computation.
